ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_data" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the country in terms of conflict */,
  "total" REAL /* Total conflict score */,
  "security_apparatus" REAL /* Security apparatus score */,
  "factionalized_elites" REAL /* Factionalized elites score */,
  "group_grievance" REAL /* Group grievance score */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy score */,
  "economic_inequality" REAL /* Economic inequality score */,
  "human_flight_and_brain_drain" REAL /* Human flight and brain drain score */,
  "state_legitimacy" REAL /* State legitimacy score */,
  "public_services" REAL /* Public services score */,
  "human_rights" REAL /* Human rights score */,
  "demographic_pressures" REAL /* Demographic pressures score */,
  "refugees_and_idps" REAL /* Refugees and IDPs score */,
  "external_intervention" REAL /* External intervention score */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., economic, political, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the value belongs to */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict data entry the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflict_data ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view data, edit indicator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization (e.g., indicator values, conflict data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_data" (
  "visualization_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization data entry */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization the data belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
